items.title: India find winning ways again but Zimbabwe still pose a threat
items.summary: Harare has presented difficult conditions for batting and will continue to do so on Saturday
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Rodri to have back surgery but Maresca brushes off transfer speculation
items.summary: World Cup winner Rodri to undergo back surgery, new Manchester City boss Enzo Maresca confirms.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: CWG: India miss medal as Ashok Kumar finishes 4th in para powerlifting
items.summary: Ashok came closest to a podium finish but narrowly missed out despite producing two successful lifts.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
